summary: GharSetu Iteration 14 - Mobile Header & Admin Dashboard Testing Complete. All features working as expected: Mobile header hides Map/Reels buttons (visible only on desktop), Mobile bottom navigation shows Home/Map/Reels icons, Admin Dashboard with login, stats, category breakdown, Users tab with Aadhar verification, and Listings tab.

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile header properly uses 'hidden md:flex' for Map/Reels buttons
Mobile bottom navigation correctly shows Home, Map, Reels icons with route links
Admin Dashboard properly shows stats overview with 6 metric cards
Listings by Category breakdown shows all 5 categories with icons
Users tab correctly displays table with Name, Email, Phone, Role, Verified columns
Aadhar verification UI shows Pending badge + Verify button for owners with unverified Aadhar
Listings tab shows cards with approve/reject buttons for pending status (none currently pending)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Mobile Header and Admin Dashboard tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested Mobile Header cleanup and Admin Dashboard. Mobile header: Map/Reels buttons use 'hidden md:flex' class (hidden on mobile, visible on desktop). Mobile bottom nav shows Home/Map/Reels with proper icons. Admin Dashboard: Login works with admin@gharsetu.com/Admin@123. Stats show 45 users, 17 listings, 3 bookings, 7 videos. Users tab has Aadhar verification with Verify button for pending owners. Listings tab shows cards with approve/reject for pending listings (none currently pending).

Mobile_Header_Map_Reels_Hidden.details: Map/Reels buttons use 'hidden md:flex' - hidden on mobile, visible on desktop

Mobile_Bottom_Navigation.details: Shows Home, Map, Reels icons with proper route links (/,/map,/reels)

Admin_Dashboard_Login.details: Login as admin@gharsetu.com works, redirects to /admin

Admin_Dashboard_Stats.details: Shows 6 stats: Total Users, Owners, Listings, Pending, Bookings, Videos

Admin_Dashboard_Category_Breakdown.details: Shows 5 categories: Home, Business, Stay, Event, Services with counts

Admin_Dashboard_Users_Tab.details: Table with Name, Email, Phone, Role, Verified columns. Shows role badges and Aadhar verification status

Admin_Dashboard_Aadhar_Verify.details: Shows Pending badge + Verify button for owners with submitted but unverified Aadhar

Admin_Dashboard_Listings_Tab.details: Shows listing cards with image, category, status badge, title, owner, price. Approve/Reject buttons for pending listings
